title: marketplace-fee — permissions
description: Tenant plane — read-only visibility into what fees are applied to them (transparency). Platform plane — Academorix ops team creates + activates schedules + settles payouts.

permissions.name: fee-schedules.viewAny
permissions.description: Tenant reads their own fee schedule.

permissions.name: fee-applications.viewAny
permissions.description: Tenant reads fee applications applied to their payments (transparency).

permissions.name: platform.fee-schedules.create
permissions.description: Create a new fee schedule for a tenant.

permissions.name: platform.fee-schedules.activate
permissions.description: Activate a draft schedule — future-dated only, never retroactive.

permissions.name: platform.fee-payouts.settle
permissions.description: Trigger Stripe transfer of pending fee_payout.
